title: Cheesecraft
description:
A minecraft modpack that aims to make it as beautiful and optimized* as possible.

*you will still need a pretty good pc for it to run well
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8c13a321725604dee9c8df65ef23f02ba4e2ced8.png) Cheesecraft strives to be a minecraft modpack that adds many new content, such as the Aether, cheese (of course), new animations, and a completely overhauled worldgen system. It also adds multiple optimization mods to make the game run as smooth as butter, considering you have a good enough computer, of course. VR SUPPORT!!!
